1306→def render_land_execution_script( 1307→ *, 1308→ pr_number: int, 1309→ branch: str, 1310→ worktree_path: Path | None, 1311→ is_current_branch: bool, 1312→ objective_number: int | None, 1313→ plan_number: int | None, 1314→ use_graphite: bool, 1315→ skip_learn: bool, 1316→ cleanup_confirmed: bool, 1317→ target_path: Path, 1318→) -> str: 1319→ """Generate shell script that executes land and navigates. 1320→ 1321→ This script is generated after validation passes. When sourced, it: 1322→ 1. Validates required arguments (PR number and branch) 1323→ 2. Calls `erk exec land-execute` with pre-validated state plus user flags 1324→ 3. If land-execute fails (e.g., merge conflict), stops immediately via ``return 1`` 1325→ 4. On success, navigates to the target location (trunk or child branch) 1326→ 1327→ Note: The execute phase always skips confirmation prompts because the user 1328→ already approved by sourcing the script. --force is not passed because 1329→ _execute_land handles this internally. 1330→ 1331→ The script requires two positional arguments: 1332→ - $1: PR number to merge 1333→ - $2: Branch name being landed 1334→ 1335→ Additional flags after the positional args (e.g., -f --up --no-pull --no-delete)

session.assistant:
Implementation complete. PR #9186 is ready for review: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9186
**Summary of what was done:** - Renamed ~400 occurrences of `plan_number`/`plan_id`/`plan_url`/`plan_title` → `pr_number`/`pr_id`/`pr_url`/`pr_title` across 58 files - Key renames: `extract_plan_title` → `extract_pr_title`, `PrViewResult.plan_id` → `pr_id`, `LearnResult.plan_id` → `pr_id` - Fixed naming conflict: `land_execute --plan-number` → `--linked-pr-number` (to avoid duplicate `--pr-number`) - Preserved erk_shared API boundaries (attribute accesses on shared types kept as-is) - All 6290 tests pass, all lint/format/type checks green
